name: 幻想乡之玉
description: "Gensokyo Orb" is a game blending unique gameplay and beautiful girl strategy. Engage in online play, solo adventures, or team up against tough foes. Lead Gensokyo's diverse, skilled girls with creative tactics and their unique powers to win!

name: Scorpion Solitaire Classic Card Game
description: Enjoy playing Scorpion Solitaire from the #1 Classic Card Game Collection for free. Customize your game with awesome card designs, backgrounds and win animations adding even more fun to this classic game.

name: 拯救日记
developer: 衢州万境互娱网络科技有限公司
publisher: 衢州万境互娱网络科技有限公司
description: Saving Diary "is an independent single player storyline card game. A game gift unexpectedly led the female protagonist Hua and her childhood sweetheart Ma Hai into an unknown world. In order to save herself and Hai, Hua embarked on a series of adventures alone in the card world.

name: The Art of War: Card Game
description: Lead one of four factions of your choice and defeat all your opponents in fierce card battles with real players from all around the world. Destroy your enemies, reinforce the power of your empire, and comprehend “The Art of War”!

name: Seeds
description: Plant seeds, and reap valuable plants in this relaxing idle game. Collect rare varieties and build your virtual garden empire, then sell your bountiful harvest on the Steam Marketplace!

name: Dark Lord
description: Unleash your power in Dark Lord, a roguelike RPG filled with strategy, adventure, and sardonic wit. Rule your growing realm with an iron fist in Story Mode, dive deep into the legends created by other players, or forge your own in Community Stories Mode!

name: Gladiate!
description: Play with 6 unique decks and fight your way through a gauntlet of foes. Not only do you need to fight to survive, but also pull off combos to maximize your spectacle points and please the crowd. Can you make it to the final boss and emerge victorious?

name: 元素传说
description: Personal development card game, BETA version. Free download and play. Enjoy the fun of lightweight card games.

name: Rune Seeker
description: Uncover the secrets of a world created and destroyed by Runes.

name: RantCPU's ClickBait
description: Here's the game: Click on RantCPU cards, and guess what? MORE CARDS! Get daily bonus rewards just for showing up—could be epic, legendary, or the ultimate one-of-one! Plus, join the Hub to create your own cards. Submit ideas, and your masterpiece might be the next big hit!

name: Pumpkin's Revenge
description: Pumpkin's Revenge Embark on an epic adventure with the Pumpkin-Head Hero. Navigate through mysterious dungeons, collect powerful loots, and battle fearsome monsters. Can you survive and become a legend?

name: FreeCell Solitaire Classic Card Game
description: Enjoy playing FreeCell Solitaire from the #1 Classic Card Game Collection for free. Customize your game with awesome card designs, backgrounds and win animations adding even more fun to this classic game.

name: Dice Player One: Trailer
description: "Dice Player One" is a roguelike strategy game where dice reign supreme! Roll your dice, seize pivotal moments, and transform limited chances into boundless opportunities. Conquer challenges, unearth hidden secrets, and master the art of dice manipulation!

name: Crack it Up! - Prologue
description: This is the free Prologue of Crack it Up!, a trading card collecting game. Order booster packs from your 90s computer, crack them up, sell your duplicates and rarest cards for profit and complete your collections!

name: Pixel Flip
description: Embark on endless stages of card matching fun. Dive into a vibrant world, collect all the "Pixels", strategize your moves and level up your character. Can you become the ultimate Pixel Collector?

name: DeathJack
description: Play Blackjack where the wager is your life. Do you have what it takes to beat the host? Let's find out...

name: Age Of Privateer
description: Age of Privateer is a real-time card battle-based roguelike deck-building game. Combine various cards to create a powerful deck and explore the vast seas. Can you uncover the secrets hidden in the ocean and find the ancient treasure?

name: Union of Gnomes: Prologue
description: The Prologue of the Union of Gnomes awaits your daring and brave gaze. Twisted and broken, it stands — a reflection of what was never meant to be. The threads of destiny fray, and reality splinters like a shattered mirror.

name: Myth Matrix
description: A Turn-based strategic card battle game. Collect cards, develop your unique deck and strategy, and have a fun PvP match with players all over the world!

name: Conflux: Prologue
description: Date! Fight! Collect! Conflux: Prologue is a collectible visual novel card game featuring a medieval fantasy setting with unique card battle mechanics and character hangout events. This is a prologue to the full version of the game – Conflux.

name: 召唤一些奇形怪状的东西打来打去的小游戏
description: Summon something strange, fight! (no English support)

name: 三國幻想戰記
description: 日系微操大世界策略戰棋SRPG登場！滿足你的幻想人生演武！重返三國榮耀的起點，見證劉關張三兄弟結拜、親身感受曹操的雄霸崛起！沉浸感、策略感十足！三國歷史由你開拓！

name: Bloons Card Storm
description: Collectible card game set in the Bloons universe, featuring unique play mechanics, distinct hero abilities, PvP and PvE modes. Download now and join the Card Storm!

name: WildFront
description: A 100% FREE unique roguelike deckbuilding experience! Collect cards, relics and monsters, but be careful not to lose your loot. Can you survive the challenge?

name: MatchOOlu
description: A card matching game like no other. Test your memory. Test your dexterity. Explore your mind.

name: Magibrick:Chapter One
description: An uniquely styled deck-building game. Assemnble a deck with the right Magibrick and challenge diverse enemies in different regions. Fill the board, destroy enemy bricks,play amazing combo, and occupy the entire board with your Magibricks, leaving no space for your enemy.

name: boringFly
description: A casual card game collection. Various card-related gameplay modes are being gradually integrated, with two modes currently available.

name: Casino Box
description: Welcome to Casino Box, a free multi-game front-end system, full of our classic casino games designed to be used in custom made cabinets by modders and makers. But the fun doesn’t stop there, it can also be enjoyed on a PC with 10 full casino games included!

name: 新月大陆
description: On the Continent, girls gather at the Magic Academy where they learn magic and combat skills,and embark on various adventures. An ancient prophecy circulates within the academy: when the new moon rises again, the world will face an unprecedented crisis, and only the academy girls can save it.

name: Reconquista
description: Reconquista is a large-scale battle strategy game with the rules of a deck-building board game with a mood of late Medieval. Carefully refine your strategy, build the best deck, and to win the battles.

name: ORDER9
description: About this game ORDER9 is an ‘auto-battle card game’ in which players use cards to turn the situation upside down in order to make their chosen character win in the arena.

name: None Shall Intrude: Descent
description: None Shall Intrude: Descent is a free Prologue version of None Shall Intrude. A roguelite deck-builder with tile-based combat where you become a powerful Raid Boss. Epic battles, intricate strategies, and the ever-present threat of heroic challengers seeking to vanquish your reign.

name: Forest Dump: Prologue
description: Forest Dump: Prologue is a free version of the upcoming roguelike card-flipping adventure game. Explore a mysterious woodland as a fox, meet strange creatures, and uncover the first secrets of your corrupted home in this beautiful journey.

name: Death or Glory
description: Death or Glory: the ultimate duelling card game! Explore exciting realms that are the proving grounds for heavenly warriors, mighty beasts, powerful mechs, and more. Build your champion deck in a roguelike adventure mode and score ranks in intense battles against fellow champions!

name: Blood Rising
description: This is a roguelike game with card battles as its core. Players need to play as a vampire ancestor to resist the attacks of a large number of adventurers and defeat three great heroes to achieve ultimate victory.

name: Crazy Battle Pets
description: Form your own team among 200+ different animals and then fight with other players! Play a game in a relaxed and pleasant atmosphere, and enjoy the game without any operations. They strengthen the animals in battle after battle until they finally win the championship.

name: Coryphaeus Championships
description: 🏆 An indie card game designed for pro play. 🏆 Enjoy ALL CARDS UNLOCKED and tournaments with great prizes for EVERYONE. Embrace 100% skill-based competition with perfect information. Collect, trade & sell Alt Arts + Premium Bosses. Let's build the card game dream!

name: Farming
description: Farming is a Trading Card Game (TCG). Every 2 hours of online planting will yield a basic crop skin. There is a 30% chance to also yield a rare crop skin each time you yield. In this game you can enhance the level of your crop skins to improve your collection, and join us to make your farm unique!

name: 海战前线-0.1版本
description: 《海战前线》是一款策略海战游戏，玩家在游戏中将化身海军司令官，组建属于自己的无敌舰队，以敏锐的洞察和高明的战术，改变海洋势力格局。游戏中不仅有超多知名战舰等待玩家收集，还有丰富的系统玩法保证游戏乐趣，更有全新0.1版本，不肝不氪，福利满满！

name: Alaska Solitaire Classic Card Game
description: Enjoy playing Alaska Solitaire from the #1 Classic Card Game Collection for free. Customize your game with awesome card designs, backgrounds and win animations adding even more fun to this classic game.

name: Canfield Solitaire Classic Card Game
description: Enjoy playing Canfield Solitaire from the #1 Classic Card Game Collection for free. Customize your game with awesome card designs, backgrounds and win animations adding even more fun to this classic game.

name: Klondike's Hike: A Solitaire Roguelike
description: Klondike, a gold-panning otter, had a vision of golden shores up in the mountains. Help her reach this mythical place in this solitaire-based roguelike! Use items to modify your cards, bend the rules, and power through the many traps in your way.

name: SUR5
description: SUR5☢️ is deckbuilding card game with a big dream of becoming home for all fans of this genre. We improved the classic formula without sacrificing depth and plan to expand design space even further!

name: 随缘修仙
description: 自幼心中藏着一个修仙梦，渴望有朝一日能御剑乘风，漫步云端，仗剑走天涯。在一次偶然的山林探险中，我意外发现了一本古老的修炼秘籍《随缘修仙》，从此踏上了梦寐以求的修仙之路。在无数个寒来暑往中，我潜心修炼，渡过九死一生的天劫，终于在一个霞光万丈的清晨，我，成仙啦！

name: 妖神记之巅峰对决
description: 《妖神记之巅峰对决》是一款策略卡牌手游。故事发生在光辉之城临危之机，聂离前世经历了九死一生后被圣帝和神级妖兽围攻力战而亡。最后凭借着时空妖灵之书，灵魂重生回到了十三岁时的圣灵学院。依靠着前世今生的记忆，聂离带着学院里伙伴们修炼，创造了一个又一个奇迹，重新向着巅峰强者迈进！

name: Usagi Sekai - Bunny Shaman
description: Fight against the corruption using your deck of offensive, defensive and special cards. Find the evil talismans infecting the Village and find new powerful cards to add into your deck. Explore a unique atmospheric world inhabited by Bunnies.

name: Free Solitaire
description: Free solitaire collection, no ads. 120+ variants. Highly customizable. Card editor.

name: 鸭蛋Duck Eggs
description: Welcome to 《Duck Eggs》, an innovative game that mixes desktop pet, collection, trading, clicking and surprise elements together. In this world, you'll collect all kinds of rare and fantastic duck eggs . Eventually, you can exchange them for money to help the duck go back to her original world.

name: Legends of Boom
description: Legends of Boom is a fast-paced RTS-Lite Battle game. Collect and upgrade cards, and challenge both human and AI opponents online, all while experiencing over 4 hours of commentary by our vice-laden puppet sportscaster, Flip Rimrod (voiced Tim Kitzrow, legendary NBA JAM announcer)

name: Dodgeball Dojo × Big 2 Anime
description: A classic loved by millions, shed cards with a twist! Control hands and win advantages energizing Athletes & Spirit Pets with martial art abilities and elemental powers!

name: Dark Goddess of Destruction: Idle
description: This is a unique card battle idle game that we have crafted together with our players. We have developed an in-depth progression system and comprehensive character and monster profiles.

name: 三国战线
description: This is an idle text game based on the Three Kingdoms. As the game progresses, the system will randomly trigger various events, and automatically trigger various military commands and various internal affairs facilities according to different development situations.

name: Cards!
description: A unique collectibe idle clicker game with droppable Steam cards

name: Poker Clicker
description: Click to deal poker hands, earn Chips, upgrade multipliers, collect tradable Cards, and climb the global leaderboard in this poker-themed clicker.

name: Takara Cards: Academy
description: Takara Cards: Academy is a free Prologue version of Takara Cards, a unique tactical deck-builder RPG. Chase space dragons and create your deck as you explore sectors, fighting your way in deep puzzly combat. Join the Federation Academy!

name: Eternal Night Glory
description: From the beginning, you've got all the cards. Now, command the garrisons of the Gate of Radiance to stop them from approaching.

name: Abyssal Shade
description: Abyssal Shade is a deck building roguelike where you dive into a dungeon of the mind. Receives the blessings of your emotions through unique puzzles and expand your deck to protect yourself from the Shades.

name: Starcade FACTIONS
description: Starcade FACTIONS is a turn-based strategy game that puts you in command of epic, fast-paced ship battles, perfect for quick bursts of action.

name: Victory of Seeker
description: An unprecedented Moba game that can compete in 4 teams.(3v3v3v3) Choose a sucker, build buildings, collect money, train, attack, loot and destroy enemy buildings, do everything to get richer than your rival. Relax with many mini-games that you can play and laugh with 8 friends at the same time.

name: Poker Train
description: Poker Train is a VIDEO POKER game where you play scoring hands to keep the wheels turning. Use your best combinations to build steam and run the train as far as you can. Complete quests and find all the secrets the railroad has to offer!

name: A Short Russian Blackjack Game
description: Blackjack and a loaded revolver. What can go wrong ? Deal, hit or stay on your card combination ! Choose wisely your life depends on it !!

name: Call of Clans
description: Call of Clans is an online turn-based strategy card game set in a magical world. Build a versatile deck with minion and skill cards to challenge equally matched opponents in a world of swords and magic. Team up with others to conquer challenging co-op dungeons

name: Click Click Bomb
description: A Giant Bomb inspired clicker-incremental game with unlockables and gimmicks to discover. A casual experience, best enjoyed on a second screen at work. Features moreish Match 3-esque mechanics.

name: Cardian
description: CARDIAN is the prototype of a fast-paced micro dungeon crawler, set in a colorful tabletop world of adventuring animals.

name: Lithium
description: Play as one of three social groups of your choice who mobilize against a planned lithium mining project. The developer seeks to start mining quickly, you aim to halt this project and initiate a debate about a just and environmentally friendly solution.

name: Scarecrow Tactics
description: A strategy card game where players use scarecrow cards to deceive each other about the number of their soldiers. With unique yet simple rules, strategic scarecrows, and quirky, hideous mercenaries, players must survive a dreadful battle where losing means being devoured by Water Deers!

name: Supercar Collection Simulator: Prologue
description: Start your own toy car store! Open surprise boxes, expand your collection and start selling. A world of speed awaits you in your shop!

name: Midnight at the Disco
description: Annihilate grotesque eyeball monsters in this top-down, roguelike, bullet purgatory, twin-stick shooter. Survive a full day raging on the dance floor by blasting baddies using unique builds combos on each frantic run to nab a spot on the online leaderboards.

name: Newton Coin Web3
description: Newton Coin This is a clicker game. In the game, you need to click on the Coin. You'll get a random Newton - themed gold coin every three hours. With effort and luck, you can continuously expand your gold coin collection!

name: Snap Flex
description: Snap Flex is a fast-paced card game based on classic Snap. Match ranks or suits, play with points or winner-takes-all. Enjoy offline or online multiplayer with up to 4 players.

name: Pioneers of the Coast
description: In this top-down, turn-based resource strategy game, you and fellow pioneers set out to start your own towns in a newly discovered region. Be the first to dominate the land and lay claim to the entire area.

name: Random Deck
description: Simple idle collectible game with free Steam cards available for trading and selling

name: Dimension Escape
description: Dimension Escape is a tactical card game where every decision counts. Choose your heroes wisely—will you pick a ninja pirate or a robo dinosaur? Equip them with powerful ability cards and defeat all who stand in your way. Free. No energy limits. No lootboxes. No ads. Just Cards, Heroes and Strategy.

name: Jianghu Diary
description: The game recreates the ever-changing scenes of the ancient martial arts world. Players can experience rich gameplay in the game, such as freely exploring the rivers and lakes, making friends with various heroes and heroes, and challenging various martial arts masters.

name: Game of Rollink
description: Game of Rollink is a PvP card game with auto-battler made with CliCli, where you play as a medieval lord to outwit sinister opponents on the gaming table and seize the supreme throne. Bet wisely because gold and countless lives of loyal soldiers are at stake.

name: Fomon
description: A very minimalistic TCG card battler featuring creatures called Fomons. Grow your collection and discover a new unique Fomon every hour NOT DURING DEMO PLAY! Each Fomon comes with a tier and has its own attributes. Compete with others climbing the leaderboard.

name: Snackdown
description: Collect, trade, and explore a world of food-themed fun! "Snackdown" is a lighthearted collectible card game featuring over 60 unique cards, ready for trading and showcasing. Perfect for casual players and collectors alike!

name: Crashers of Aetheria
description: Crashers of Aetheria is a strategy card collecting game. Players use Crashers to strategically take out their opponent in the arena online.

name: World Series of Poker Game - WSOP
description: The official World Series of Poker free-to-play Texas Hold'em game – the #1 free-to-play poker game in the world! Play exciting poker games with players from around the globe, win collectibles like the pros, and prove you're a WSOP poker champ!

name: Texas Hold'em Poker: Pokerist
description: Try the legendary Texas Poker! Enjoy a real casino atmosphere and superior 3D graphics. Jump into a world of excitement, challenge other players, and show you're a true winner!

name: Dobro Goranku
description: A TCG like you’ve never played before. Dobro Goranku combines fast-paced action, deep strategy, and the art of bluffing, letting you build unique decks and defeat rivals in breathtaking duels.

name: DraftPunk
description: DraftPunk is a CCG with a focus on limited draft play. Set up a draft pod and invite your friends, or play against AI bots. Free to play on Steam!

name: Scrongly
description: Scrongly is a free poker themed roguelite deckbuilding game inspired by Balatro. Make a one card straight flush, blow up your whole deck with bombs, play seven card poker hands, and much more!

name: Art of Solitaire
description: Level up your chill time with Art of Solitaire. Forget boring card decks – we’re teaming up with real indie artists to design every card, bringing you gorgeous, original artwork. Build your ultimate card collection as you flick through Patience, Pyramid, and Spider. De-stress with a good FLICK!

name: Pokerchinko
description: Pokerchinko is an old-school pachinko game. Your goal is to use your skills of precision to snag the card that makes the best poker hand. The better the hand, the better the rewards. Feel the tension as the balls bounce wildly around the playfield and the exhilaration of landing a fantastic hand.

name: God's Continent
description: "God's Continent" is a strategy card game. You will enter a magical world full of fantasy and adventure. Along the way, you can form a powerful team of your own among the three races of humans, beasts and demons, and embark on the road to fight against darkness.

name: Dungeon Raid: Zero Floor
description: Dungeon Raid is an adventure card roguelike. Dive deeper and deeper into the dungeon. Use everything you find to defeat enemies and kill the final boss. Good luck! And try not to die... from hunger.

name: Deck Dash
description: Deck Dash is a PvP auto-card battler. Craft your deck, build your engine, discover countless combos, and defeat all your enemies. Sort your items and create your engines to win epic tactical fights. Explore and upgrade items and become the ultimate survivor of The Island.

name: Booster
description: Open free boosters every 3 hours and collect unique cards straight into your Steam Inventory. Trade, sell, or flex — the choice is yours.

name: Zynga Poker ™ – Texas Holdem
description: Join one of the world's most popular free-to-play poker games! Featuring more tables, tournaments, jackpots, mini-games and players than ever! Whether you enjoy casual Texas Hold'em, Omaha or competitive tournaments, Zynga Poker is your go-to for exciting, authentic gameplay.

name: Hack&Po
description: Hack & Po is a 1v1 strategy card game with a 5-class RPS system. Draft your deck, predict your opponent, and battle using cards and timed consumables. Victory comes by outplaying your rival until their lantern fades or you gain a +10 life advantage.

name: Climax Cards: Blackjack
description: A social adult blackjack game where you play hands, earn coins and gems, unlock over 25 explicit CG scenes, and trigger interactive climax minigames with skill-based cards—no gambling, just seductive rewards and strategic progression.

name: Neuroarena: Black Duel Master
description: Neuroarena is a free online card game featuring unique generated cards that evolve over time. Engage in PvP duels, explore a vast card universe, and enjoy strategic battles in an ever-evolving world. Perfect for fans of collectible card games and epic hero clashes!

name: Tank Rectangle
description: This is a simple & retro Tank shotting game. what you need is moving, aiming and shotting. Currently we only have 1 map, no boss or plot. The only task is try to survive...

name: Elestrals Clash!
description: Elestrals Clash! is an innovative cross-platform digital card game that brings epic mythical beings to life! Players can wield elemental powers, explore diverse environments, and engage in strategic clashes wherever they are. Wishlist now to Ascend to Immortality and unlock exclusive rewards!

name: Cloudtop Chaos
description: Help Cloudi and friends conjure colorfully chaotic magic in this cozy collection of infinitely-replayable puzzle games!

name: ARC TCG
description: ARC TCG is a strategic 3D card game set in a fantasy universe with over 350 cards and 15 heroes. Build your deck and engage in battles with an automatic combat system, where every choice and every move determines victory. Get ready to forge your legend

name: Forest Rites
description: Defeat the forest's masters in this exciting trick-taking card battler!

name: Accordion Solitaire
description: A different kind of solitaire. More difficult, more strategic.

name: Voden's Job
description: Play cards that draw cards, that draw more cards, that earn you DNA to evolve your specimen.

name: Baccarat Online: Baccarist
description: Favored by the highest of high rollers, baccarat is one of the world's oldest and most popular card games. The aim of the game is to guess who will hit the highest hand value, which in this game is 9. Feel the risk as you dive into the casino atmosphere and hit the big time!

name: Clutchtime™: Tournament Edition
description: Shoot threes, slam dunk, block opponent shots and steal the ball. Rebound and run fast breaks. Call timeouts and substitute players. Every basketball action is a card. Manage the time remaining on the game clock. Win 4 games in a row to become a champion!

name: Beastopia
description: A strategy game that combines resource management and auction mechanics, where players compete for financial dominance in the Animal Kingdom through clever investments and bidding.

name: Acki Nacki - Popit Game
description: Play Acki Nacki - Popit Game — a massively multiplayer roguelike card game. Сlimb a tower of Blocks. Use game-breaking Popits to defeat other players. Chain strategic combos to boost your score and sabotage your rivals on the live leaderboard.

name: Cards, the Universe and Everything
description: Cards, the Universe and Everything is a unique trading card game with almost limitless possibilities: Dinosaurs, Norse gods, blue-footed boobies, Samurai, volcanoes, even the god particle. With the universe’s thingamabobs and endless strategies, are you ready for this gloriously bonkers game?

name: Pair Master
description: A challenging matching game that requires quick reflexes and memory skills. It includes both single-player and multiplayer modes, with various difficulty levels and objectives to choose from in competitive play.

name: Gemstone Realm
description: Explore unknown secret caves, successfully hunt monsters inside, and obtain various mysterious power hungry gems. These angry gems not only help us grow, but also have the opportunity to be exchanged for US dollars and fiat currency. Endless Adventure and Wealth - All in the Secret Gem Realm

name: Mutants: Genesis
description: Mutants: Genesis is an online card game that you can play solo or with up to 3 players in PvE and PvP modes! Join the next generation of Psycogs and climb the ranks to establish yourself as Champion! Collect hundreds of mutants, fashion your own deck, cooperate with or fight other players!

name: War Grid Hero
description: War Grid Hero is a turn-based card battle game developed by an independent creator. In the game, players must deploy cards to occupy zones, earning points to defeat their opponents.

name: 挂机三国-无限升级
description: Three Kingdoms card development auto chess lineup with battle mode.

name: Hit and Stand Blackjack
description: Relax with a cozy anime-style Blackjack game featuring smooth gameplay, chill music, and multiple difficulty levels. Play at your own pace and unwind anytime.

name: TCG Master Trader
description: Claim a free pack of cards every few hours and expand your collection! Discover hundreds of unique cards with different styles, rarities, and visual effects.

name: Bling Bling Bankruptcy
description: Gamble, survive, and outplay your debt! In Bling Bling Bankruptcy, you’re deep in the red, and the only way out is through high-stakes gambling. Play Poker, Blackjack, Roulette, Plinko, and more, buy items for bonuses, and survive as many days as possible!

name: Dishventory
description: Wash piling dirty dishes in this strategic card game! Figure out cool dish combinations and discover new dishes with their own abilities.

name: Fracctal TCG
description: Fracctal TCG distills the thrill of monster collecting into a one-versus-one card game built for quick, tactical showdowns.

name: Built to Scale Solitaire
description: Have you had a busy day from work? Is the daily grind stressing you out? Try Built to Scale Solitaire, a uniquely designed card game inspired by Zachtronics' solitaires!

name: Game of Dice
description: Roll the dice, rule your fate! Thrilling real-time board battles!

name: Cat Syndicate: Istanbul
description: Get ready for a mix of chaos, strategy, and cuteness in the heart of Istanbul. Run your own cat business among the city's legendary street cats, grow your lira income. It may look adorable... but underneath lies a game that rewards careful planning, just like navigating the Grand Bazaar itself.

name: Solitaire Battle Online
description: "Solitaire" and "Spider" are created in intense competitions. Compete not with a deck, but with players from all over the world. Your goal is not just to collect solitaire, but to do it more faster and more efficiently than everyone else.

name: The Time Game
description: The Time Game is a complex strategy card-game where you can bend the rules of time to outsmart your opponents! Play solo or online with friends!

name: Banana Loco
description: A thrilling tile-based treasure hunt where players uncover banana prizes while dodging traps and explosive surprises. Are you ready to go bananas? 🍌💥

name: Duelyst: Blitz
description: Lightning-fast reimagining of the beloved tactical card battler Duelyst, designed for intense, strategic matches you can finish in just a few minutes. Engage in dynamic, turn-based duels where every move matters.

name: Galaxy Card Game
description: Sci-fi strategy card battler. Build galactic fleets, consume supplies to deploy units, and battle across the stars. Unique supply mechanics break traditional cost limitations - every deployment is a choice between survival and expansion. All cards free, skill determines victory.

name: Dragon Ace Casino
description: Dragon Ace Casino is the must-have social game for all casino and card-game fans! Enjoy multi-platform Baccarat, Blackjack, Texas Hold'em Poker, and Slots with players from all around the world. Play for fun with in-game currency and level up your play with daily tournaments and leaderboards.

name: Valiants: Arena
description: Each card is a possibility. Each move, a step toward victory. Collect, combine and unleash the elemental power of your Valiants in intense turn-based battles. Can you conquer the arena and become the ultimate Tamer?

name: Gogyō
description: After so much effort and training, the day of the final test has finally arrived. Under the guidance of Sensei, face off against other disciples to become the sole “Master of the 5 Elements.” To achieve this, be the wisest, the most cunning, or... the fastest!

name: Legacy's Allure
description: Legacy's Allure is a customizable, card-based wargame with no randomness. Command warriors, beasts, and mages on the battlefield to outplay your opponent in this chess-inspired fantasy battle.

name: Factory Planner: First Sparks
description: Factory Planner: First Sparks is a card-based simulation and strategy game. In this Prologue version, build your own factory using strategic card combinations and enjoy a unique sandbox experience.

name: Quetzal - Card Battle TCG
description: Quetzal is the ultimate Card Battle game based on Aztec mythology. Fight in fast-paced duels with powerful Creatures and Spells, upgrade cards and upgrade your base to get more rewards, play online or offline and collect all the cards to build the best deck!

name: Trick Or Beat
description: Stack your trick pile or beat up your opponent! Trick or Beat is a fair 1v1 battlecards game with a shared draw pile. Can you discover the best strategies? Without any pay to win!

name: Dopdop Online
description: Dopdop Online is a free-to-play cosmic card battler. Collect and combine unique creature and skill cards, strategize in turn-based 1v1 matches, and outsmart opponents in fast-paced duels. Experience quick matches, deep gameplay, and cosmic visuals.

name: Mini Magic Match
description: Welcome to this joyful magical world. Here, you'll find a rainbow of candies, jellies, and chocolates. Match, eliminate, and collect them all. Additionally, you can utilize various power-ups, such as bombs, to eliminate even more.

name: Elemental: Story Cards
description: A turn-based card strategy game where players score points by playing cards to complete level objectives, trigger multiplier bonuses by combining different suits, purchase items and policy cards in shops to enhance their deck, and challenge four types of progressively difficult levels.

name: Wastelanders
description: Survival looks ugly, but the ugly survive. Wastelanders is a dystopian turn-based card battler where desperation corrupts souls deeper than the alien Waste. Build your deck to defend Humanity's last haven, but avert their eyes. Lest they see that the Waste has already taken your beauty.

name: Memoria
description: Memoria is a classic memory matching game designed for Windows 3.1. Players are presented with a grid of face-down tiles, each holding a pictogram. The Objective is to find all matching pairs by flipping two tiles at a time.

name: Smutstone
description: Experience the best of both worlds: an immersive card game packed with thrilling fantasy erotica. Uncover hidden desires and secrets as you enjoy juicy maidens and advance through the story.

name: Idle Legion
description: Observe, analyze, plan, and change the battle! Focus on your legion's combat, analyze key moments and positions. Adjust formations to ensure victory for Dark Lords! A single legion move can change the outcome—this game tests sharp insight and strategic thinking.

name: Blackfire Crusade
description: Experience a hardcore dark-fantasy RPG where tactical mastery is your only hope. Recruit legendary heroes, brave perilous dungeons, and challenge the very gods who forsook this world.

name: Tales of Terrarum
description: 《Tales of Terrarum》is a management adventure sim game. On the new land of Terrarum, you will inherit a territory as a descendant of the Francz family, and become the town mayor to settle the craftsmen and adventurers who come to the town. You'll live in and expand the town together.

name: Hell is Empty, Demons are playing Apokerlypse
description: A deck-building roguelike shedding card game. You will play as Satan—a humble civil servant in Hell—and embark on a 3-chapter Story Mode. By combining various skills and demonic chips, you will take down powerful bosses and claim your throne as the new King of Hell.

name: Super Scoundrel Solitaire
description: A solitaire card game with a dungeon theme. Can you make it to the end?

name: Card Trainer
description: A simple but hard card game where you collect unique unit cards and use them to rummage through stages looking for new cards.

name: Batak
description: A classic Turkish trick-taking card game for 1-4 players. Play Klasik Batak or Eşli Batak (Partnership) against AI opponents or with friends online through Steam multiplayer. Bid, choose trump, and outplay your rivals.

name: Baize
description: Play classic card and board games with friends on any device. Host a game from your PC and invite others to join — no accounts needed for local play. Includes Hearts, Spades, Whist, Sevens, Gin Rummy, Backgammon, FreeCell, and more. Play against bots or with up to 8 players.

name: Mutiny
description: Build your deck and reclaim your captain’s throne in this short roguelite deckbuilder.

name: Nocturnal Quest: An Idle RPG Adventure
description: Nocturnal Quest is a Semi-Idle Adventure RPG with 100s of spells & effects, 6 classes, 12 specializations, and countless builds. Have your teams grind gear and progress through an infinity of levels!

name: WarDeck
description: WarDeck is a turn-based strategy game combining board game tactics with deckbuilding mechanics. Build your unique elemental deck and position your cards wisely on the board. Defeat Bosses in the challenging Adventure mode or challenge rivals in the PvP arena.

name: Divide TCG
description: Gather your party and build the ultimate deck in Divide TCG, a retro pixel-art card game inspired by classic tabletop RPGs. Draft powerful artifacts, craft winning strategies, and forge your legend starting with the Genesis set.

name: Durak Online by Pokerist
description: Play the best Durak Online game with real players for free! Invite friends, choose your game mode, and enjoy fantastic graphics on any device.
